videos.description: It’s HERE!!! 🎉 🥺🙌🏽 This week so released my new book - a devotional for entrepreneurs. This book wasn’t on my forecast. I had a completely different next release planned. I finished writing it as an outlet during a heavy season—shortly after my grandmother passed—while still needing to show up, lead, and build. What started as a personal outlet quickly became something much bigger: a devotional for entrepreneurs in the thick of the fight. This book is for the seasons when business doesn’t pause, pressure is high, and clarity feels just out of reach. When you’re carrying responsibility, making hard decisions, managing finances, and still trying to keep your faith intact. It’s not theory. It’s not fluff. It’s real encouragement, Scripture, and practical wisdom for entrepreneurs who are actively building—while navigating stress, doubt, fatigue, and uncertainty. This book is for visionaries who don’t have the luxury of stopping, but still need strength, direction, and reminders that God is present in the process. I believe this book is going to bless and anchor entrepreneurs who are quietly fighting and faithfully building. Click the link in my bio to order your copy!

videos.title: 12 YEARS!! WOW. This is my final month of business for Boutique J.Ren...
videos.description: 12 YEARS!! WOW. This is my final month of business for Boutique J.Renee, and whew… the emotions have been everywhere. Some days I’m excited about what’s next. Some days I’m sad. Some days I’m full of faith. Some days I’m afraid. But today? I’m PROUD. Period. I DID THAT!!! Most businesses don’t make it past 2 years, let alone 12, and that ALONE is something to be proud of!!  I launched this brand in the dining room of my one-bedroom apartment and grew it beyond anything I could’ve imagined. Thousands of customers across 5 continents. Full-time and part-time staff sustained. Scaled to 7 figure years and STAYED there until the year we closed. From home-based hustle to a warehouse in Midtown Atlanta!! Nothing but hard work, lots of learning and the grace of GOD!!  All while walking through death, loss, sickness, heartbreak, relocations (yes, plural), and pressures most people never see….But I never quit. Did I know everything when I started? Absolutely not. I learned a lot the hard way—but that wisdom is earned, not borrowed. Now I’m stepping into my next chapter, and I’m excited about training, building and accelerating other entrepreneurs with MY learned/ lived experience.  I’m not telling you what I heard! I’m teaching REAL strategy, and real results. I’m hosting my first LIVE class of 2026 this coming Thursday at 8pm. If you’re ready to shatter glass ceilings and take your e-commerce business through the roof— comment “CLASS” and I’ll send you the registration link. Let’s WORK. 💼✨

videos.title: Okay so quick update on my tattoo removal journey — because I’ve been...
videos.description: Okay so quick update on my tattoo removal journey — because I’ve been getting a lot of questions. I’ve been going to Removery in Sandy Springs, and I’m about 9 or 10 sessions in. This is not a fast process, y’all. My last two sessions were spaced 6 months apart. The laser breaks the ink up, but your body has to do the rest. That’s why it takes time. Yes, it hurts — but it’s quick, so it’s manageable. I’m honestly really happy with my results and if you’re thinking about getting a tattoo removed, I’d definitely recommend it.
